originalTitle: 3 Reasons to Sell ARHS and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the last six months, Arhaus’s shares have sunk to $8.62, producing a disappointing 19% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 8.4% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
content:
Over the last six months, Arhaus's shares have sunk to $8.62, producing a disappointing 19% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500's 8.4% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

Is now the time to buy Arhaus, or should you be careful about including it in your portfolio? Dive into our full research report to see our analyst team's opinion, it's free .

Even though the stock has become cheaper, we don't have much confidence in Arhaus. Here are three reasons we avoid ARHS, plus one stock we'd rather own.

1. Shrinking Same-Store Sales Indicate Waning Demand

Same-store sales show the change in sales for a retailer's e-commerce platform and brick-and-mortar shops that have existed for at least a year. This is a key performance indicator because it measures organic growth.

Arhaus's demand has been shrinking over the last two years as its same-store sales have averaged 1.2% annual declines.

2. Fewer Distribution Channels Limit Its Ceiling

With $1.38 billion in revenue over the past 12 months, Arhaus is a small retailer, which sometimes brings disadvantages compared to larger competitors benefiting from economies of scale and negotiating leverage with suppliers.

Analyzing the long-term change in earnings per share (EPS) shows whether a company's incremental sales were profitable — for example, revenue could be inflated through excessive spending on advertising and promotions.

Sadly for Arhaus, its EPS declined by 25.6% annually over the last three years while its revenue grew by 2.4%. This tells us the company became less profitable on a per-share basis as it expanded.

Arhaus isn't a terrible business, but it isn't one of our picks. After the recent drawdown, the stock trades at 17.6× forward P/E (or $8.62 per share). Investors with a higher risk tolerance might like the company, but we don't really see a big opportunity at the moment. We're pretty confident there are superior stocks to buy right now. We'd recommend looking at one of our all-time favorite software stocks .

High-Quality Stocks for All Market Conditions

ONE MORE THING: Top 6 Stocks for This Week. This market is separating quality stocks from expensive ones fast. AI is taking down whole sectors with no warning. In a rotation this fast, you need more than a list of good companies.

Our AI system flagged Palantir before it ran 1,662%. AppLovin before it ran 753%. Nvidia before it ran 1,178%. Each week it produces 6 new names that pass the same tests. Get Our Top 6 Stocks for Free HERE .

Stocks that have made our list include now familiar names such as Nvidia (+1,326% between June 2020 and June 2025) as well as under-the-radar businesses like the once-micro-cap company Kadant (+351% five-year return). Find your next big winner with StockStory today .
chineseTitle: 出售 ARHS 并买入 1 只股票的 3 个理由
chineseSummary: 在过去的六个月里，Arhaus 的股价已跌至 8.62 美元，令人失望地下跌了 19%，与标准普尔 500 指数 8.4% 的涨幅形成鲜明对比。这可能会让投资者考虑下一步行动。
chineseContent:
在过去的六个月里，Arhaus 的股价已跌至 8.62 美元，令人失望地下跌了 19%，与标准普尔 500 指数 8.4% 的涨幅形成鲜明对比。这可能会让投资者考虑下一步行动。

现在是购买 Arhaus 的时候了，还是应该谨慎地将其纳入您的投资组合？深入研究我们的完整研究报告，了解我们分析师团队的意见，它是免费的。

尽管股票变得便宜了，但我们对Arhaus没有太大信心。以下是我们避免 ARHS 的三个原因，以及我们宁愿持有的一只股票。

1. 同店销售萎缩表明需求减弱

同店销售额显示零售商的电子商务平台和存在至少一年的实体店的销售额变化。这是一个关键绩效指标，因为它衡量有机增长。

过去两年，Arhaus 的同店销售额平均每年下降 1.2%，其需求一直在萎缩。

2. 较少的分销渠道限制了其上限

Arhaus 是一家小型零售商，过去 12 个月的收入为 13.8 亿美元，与受益于规模经济和与供应商谈判杠杆的大型竞争对手相比，这有时会带来劣势。

分析每股收益 (EPS) 的长期变化可以显示公司的增量销售是否有利可图，例如，广告和促销方面的过度支出可能会夸大收入。

对于 Arhaus 来说不幸的是，过去三年其每股收益每年下降 25.6%，而收入却增长 2.4%。这告诉我们，随着公司扩张，每股盈利有所下降。

Arhaus 并不是一家糟糕的公司，但它不是我们的选择之一。在最近的下跌之后，该股的预期市盈率为 17.6 倍（即每股 8.62 美元）。具有较高风险承受能力的投资者可能会喜欢该公司，但目前我们并没有真正看到很大的机会。我们非常有信心现在有优质股票可供购买。我们建议您查看我们一直以来最喜欢的软件股票之一。

适合所有市场条件的优质股票

还有一件事：本周排名前 6 的股票。这个市场正在快速地将优质股票与昂贵股票分开。人工智能正在毫无预警地摧毁整个行业。在如此快速的轮换中，您需要的不仅仅是一份优秀公司的名单。

我们的 AI 系统在 Palantir 运行 1,662% 之前对其进行了标记。 AppLovin之前的运行率为753%。此前英伟达的股价为 1,178%。每周都会产生 6 个通过相同测试的新名字。在此免费获取我们的前 6 名股票。

进入我们名单的股票包括现在熟悉的名字，如 Nvidia（2020 年 6 月至 2025 年 6 月期间增长 1,326%），以及曾经不为人知的企业，如曾经的微型股公司 Kadant（五年回报率增长 351%）。立即通过 StockStory 寻找您的下一个大赢家。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
